headline: Salesforce, Adobe Stocks Face 2008-Style Collapse In 'SaaSpocalypse'
summary: The software sector is undergoing a correction, particularly within the software-as-a-service (SaaS) industry, as AI threatens its business model. Major players like Salesforce, Inc. and Adobe, Inc. are facing their worst quarterly performance since the height of the 2008 financial crisis, prompting concerns of a potential “SaaSpocalypse” and questions about a 2008-style collapse. Investors are increasingly wary of the potential disruptive impact of AI on SaaS business models, stemming from the
